message:
feat(gui): copy WezTerm GUI source files and vendor bootstrap crates (ft-1memj.3)

Copy 58 source files from legacy_wezterm/wezterm-gui/src/ including
termwindow/, overlay/, scripting/ and shader files.

Vendor: env-bootstrap (stub), tabout, mux-lua, url-funcs, window-funcs.
Add missing workspace deps: emojis, fastrand, hdrhistogram, http_req,
nucleo-matcher, rayon, wgpu.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
